name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express La Mesa, California — ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with physical s...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a national network of physical locations providing short-term financial solutions to consumers who need quick access to cash. The company has been serving customers through brick-and-mortar storefronts, with locations mentioned in states including Colorado, California, and Louisiana, alongside an online loan platform for digital applications.

ACE's service menu spans multiple product categories: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, business services, and prepaid cards. The breadth of their offerings positions them as a one-stop financial services center rather than a single-product lender, allowing existing customers to access multiple services at the same location.

ACE distinguishes itself through its extensive physical retail footprint, which provides face-to-face customer service unavailable at purely online competitors. They offer dedicated customer service channels for both general inquiries and online loan applications, with toll-free numbers and email support listed on their website.

A significant limitation evident from the provided website content is that specific product details, terms, APRs, and availability information are not accessible through the URLs provided—both the location page and tax-services page returned 404 errors. The website indicates that certain loan types are not available in all states (with a specific message about unavailability in some jurisdictions). Without access to complete product terms and pricing information, consumers cannot verify exact loan amounts, repayment periods, or interest rates directly from these pages.
address: 7900 El Cajon Blvd Ste H, La Mesa, CA 91942

company_info.headquarters: 7900 El Cajon Blvd Ste H, La Mesa, CA 91942

pros: Multiple financial services available at single locations (loans, check cashing, bill payments, tax services, money transfers)
Physical retail locations across multiple states for in-person service and immediate assistance
Online loan application option available in addition to store visits
Dedicated customer service teams with separate phone lines for general inquiries and online loan operations
Offers both installment loans and title loans for different borrowing needs
Multiple contact methods available (phone: 877-ACE-CASH or 866-ACE-CASH, email support)
Prepaid card offerings available to customers
cons: Website accessibility issues—location-specific pages return 404 errors, preventing access to detailed product information and terms
Loan product availability varies significantly by state with no clear transparency about which services are available where
Specific interest rates, fees, and loan terms are not disclosed on accessible website content
No pricing or APR information available for comparison before visiting a store or calling
Recent service disruptions documented (New Orleans locations temporarily closed due to Hurricane Ida at time of website snapshot)
best_for: Consumers who need immediate cash and prefer in-person service at physical locations
Vehicle owners considering title loans as a collateral-based borrowing option
Customers seeking multiple financial services (check cashing, bill payments, money transfers) at one location
Borrowers in states where ACE operates who want both online and offline loan application options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in states where they operate who need quick emergency cash and prefer face-to-face service at physical locations. The primary caveat is that critical product details—interest rates, fees, loan terms, and exact availability—are not accessible through the provided website pages, requiring direct store visits or phone calls to obtain specific loan terms before applying.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
